response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their resume shows senior/staff-level responsibilities for over a decade, with no indication of seeking a step-down or entry-level position, and their German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple roles
Strong full-stack exposure with React, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL-like SQL usage
Proven track record in open-source and scalable system design (e.g., GISCollective, Kubernetes)
concerns: Holds staff/senior titles for 8+ years — far exceeds junior/mid-level scope
German language skills are basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
Focus on DLang, embedded, and AI-agent tools may distract from core platform priorities
